title: Aetherial Islands: Clusters Edit
description: Datapack that modifies Aetherial Islands to have island clusters, with configurable rarity functions in the datapack.
body:
# Aetherial Islands: Clusters Edit

This is a simple data pack that modifies the terrain functions for the island placement in [Aetherial Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aetherial-islands), [Skylands Over The Sea](https://modrinth.com/datapack/skylands-over-the-sea), and [Angel Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/angel-islands) to be in clusters, rather than uniformly distributed throughout the world.

### Make sure this is *above* the other datapack when using, otherwise it will not work!!

Check the Gallery for instructions on modifying the cluster size and spread! You can also upload it to [Misode](https://misode.github.io/worldgen/density-function/) and edit there.

If you are as annoyed with the Trial Chambers taking up the sky as I am, you can reduce them by modifying their `structure_set.json` file `separation`/`spacing` fields. I'll maybe add that in the future.
